backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing guestbook entries with CRUD operations, user profiles, location tracking, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting six implemented features including interactive Leaflet maps, hover tooltips, entry editing/deletion, and zoom functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, pages, utilities, and styling for the VTH Guest Book application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color variables for light/dark modes with an earthy palette and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with VTH branding, favicon reference, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for feed, add entry, entry detail, world map, and AT map pages.
frontend/src/components/AboutDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component explaining the VTH Guest Book project and defining what a 'vicarious thru-hiker' is.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout wrapper with header (VTH logo and title), footer with About button and attribution, and bottom navigation bar for main routes.
Dialog component for editing guestbook entries with form fields for name, trail name, comment, current location, and favorite place, using place search and encoding location place names into comments.
frontend/src/components/MapLegend.tsx: Simple card component displaying an informational legend instructing users to tap map pins to view entry details.
frontend/src/components/MapPin.tsx: SVG-based map pin button component with hover and selection states, rendering a location marker icon.
frontend/src/components/PlaceSearchField: Form field component for searching places using geocoding API, displaying search results in a dropdown select and auto-selecting single results.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating guestbook entries (get all, get with location/favorite place, add, update, delete) with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind setup, OKLCH color system defining warm earthy light/dark themes, touch-friendly sizing, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/lib/geocoding.ts: Utility module for geocoding place names using OpenStreetMap Nominatim API, returning normalized results with display names and coordinates.
frontend/src/lib/guestbookFormat.ts: Provides formatting utilities for guestbook entries including author labels, relative timestamps, coordinate formatting, and encoding/decoding of place names within comment text.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function `cn` that merges Tailwind CSS classes using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AddEntryPage.tsx: Form page for creating new guestbook entries with fields for name, trail name, comment, current location, and favorite place, supporting both manual coordinates and place search.
frontend/src/pages/ATMapPage.tsx: Displays an interactive map of the Appalachian Trail with pins for favorite places from guestbook entries, supporting zoom, pan, and pin selection with auto-fit bounds.
frontend/src/pages/EntryDetailPage.tsx: Displays full details of a single guestbook entry with edit and delete actions available to the entry creator.
frontend/src/pages/GuestbookFeedPage.tsx: Main feed page showing all guestbook entries in reverse chronological order with badges indicating location data and navigation to individual entries.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMapPage.tsx: Displays an interactive world map with pins for current locations from guestbook entries, supporting zoom, pan, and pin selection with auto-fit bounds.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, typography, container queries, animations, and custom design tokens for a component library.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for an interactive pin board travel application, documenting completed features (Leaflet maps, hover tooltips, guestbook CRUD) and pending feature requests for map enhancements.
